name: ai-autocomplete
description: Inline code autocomplete (ghost text) powered by AI CLIs, starting with Claude Code.

aiAutocomplete.provider.description: Which AI provider to use for completions.

aiAutocomplete.claude.model.description: Claude model alias or full name used for completions (a fast model is recommended).

aiAutocomplete.claude.executablePath.description: Path to the Claude Code CLI binary (e.g. C:\Users\you\.local\bin\claude.exe). Leave empty to auto-detect 'claude' on your PATH. Requires Claude Code to be installed and authenticated.

aiAutocomplete.claude.disableThinking.description: Disable the model's extended thinking. Strongly recommended for autocomplete: it cuts latency roughly 3x (~6s to ~2s) with no quality loss for short completions.

aiAutocomplete.debounceMs.description: Milliseconds to wait after the user stops typing before requesting a suggestion.

aiAutocomplete.contextLinesBefore.description: Number of lines before the cursor to send as context.

aiAutocomplete.contextLinesAfter.description: Number of lines after the cursor to send as context.

aiAutocomplete.maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens the model may produce for a single completion.

aiAutocomplete.showLoadingIndicator.description: Show an animated spinner as ghost text at the cursor while a suggestion is being generated.
